holdings.infoBox: FFLV is an equity ETF with a total of 121 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 5.00%, Exxon Mobil at 3.71%, Western Digital at 2.58%, Wells Fargo & Company at 2.57%, and Cisco Systems at 2.46%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Fundamental Large Cap Value ETF (FFLV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that provides exposure to large-cap value stocks from around the world. The fund selects equity securities based on fundamental research and analysis. FFLV was launched on Feb 22, 2024 and is issued by Fidelity.
